component.name: Strawalarm
component.summary: Sleep timer and music alarm for MPRIS2 players

description.p: Fall asleep to your music and wake up to a different playlist — the classic AIMP sleep-timer/alarm workflow, for any Linux media player that speaks MPRIS2 (Strawberry, VLC, Elisa, ...).

Playback stops after a duration or a number of tracks with a gentle fade-out; the machine may suspend and is woken again by an RTC alarm; at wake time one of the player's open playlists fades in from silence. Includes snooze, recurring weekday alarms, a system-tray countdown and a scriptable command-line interface.
